title: caricinella pulicaris
intro: Caricinella pulicaris is a plant species, also known as the flea clover, which is characterized by its small, pink or purple flowers and ability to attract and kill fleas. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including its ability to repel insects and act as an antiseptic. Some of the health benefits associated with Caricinella pulicaris include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, or teas, and is often used topically to treat skin irritations and insect bites.
